title: Einer frisst den anderen
director: Gustav Gavrin, Richard E. Cunha, Ray Nazarro
writer: Robert Hill, Michael Elkins, Leslie Edgley
actors: Jayne Mansfield, Cameron Mitchell, Dodie Heath
plot: Three thieves rip off a shipment of used money being sent back to the US. As they are escaping the robbery (after having taken a hostage), they wind up on an island in a hotel with an apparently crazed manager and a building full ...
